doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future and proposes a radical interpretation of GDPR scope that is inconsistent with current EDPB guidelines and CJEU case law.
